@startuml
package "C" as C {
    ProductManagement
    Guid
    Product
    Warehouse
}

ProductManagement ..>> ProductManagement : AverageCost : double <<get>> <<set>>
ProductManagement ..>> ProductManagement : Amount : int <<get>> <<set>>
ProductManagement ..>> ProductManagement : Clone() : ProductManagement
ProductManagement ..>> void : Copy(productControl:ProductManagement)

ProductManagement --> Guid : Id
ProductManagement --> Product : Product
ProductManagement --> Warehouse : Warehouse

@enduml
